hero.subheadline: Waxbarasho bilaash ah oo ku habboon dhaqanka iyo taageero bulsho oo loogu talagalay haweenka nugul, laga tirada badan yahay, soogalootiga, qaxootiga, iyo haweenka la raray ee Norfolk.

impact.sectionDesc: Iyada oo loo marayo waxbarashada ku habboon dhaqanka ee saddex kooxood oo sanadle ah, waxaan gaaraynaa haweenka ugu baahan taageerada.

gallery.sectionDesc: Hooyo kasta waxay xaq u leedahay helista taageerada dhalmada ee dhaqan ahaan u habboon, iyada oo aan loo eegin asalkeeda ama duruufteeda.
gallery.bottomText: Go Nurture Initiative CIC waa shirkad hantiyeed bulsho oo fadhigeedu yahay Norfolk oo bixisa taageero dhalmo oo bilaash ah oo tixraac ku salaysan haweenka nugul, laga tirada badan yahay, soogalootiga, qaxootiga, iyo haweenka la raray.

fundingBridge.sectionDesc: Iib kasta oo ka yimaada qaybteena ganacsi waxa uu si toos ah u maalgeliyay taageerada dhalmada bulshada ee bilaashka ah ee haweenka ugu baahan.
fundingBridge.step1Desc: Ka iibso xirmooyinka waxbarashada dhalmada ee Nurtured and Nourished Health Ltd
fundingBridge.step2Desc: Qayb ka mid ah faa'iidada waxa uu u gudbiyaa Masuuliyadda Bulsho ee Shirkadda Go Nurture CIC
fundingBridge.step3Desc: Lacaguhu waxay bixiyaan waxbarasho dhalmo oo bilaash ah oo dhaqan ahaan u habboon haweenka nugul ee Norfolk
fundingBridge.ctaDesc: Dashboard-ka hufnaanta ayaa si cad u tusaya sida lacag kasta u abuurto saamayn bulsho.

footer.commercialDesc: Iibka ka yimaada shirkadda hooyada ayaa maalgeliyay adeegyadan bulshada ee bilaashka ah.
footer.copyright: Xuquuqda oo dhan waa la dhowray.
footer.madeWith: Ku samaysan jacayl ❤️ oo loogu talagalay hooyo kasta
